title: pelargonium × pannifolium
intro: Pelargonium × pannifolium, also known as a hybrid of the pelargonium plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and relief from respiratory issues.
